message:
fix(mermaid): add Gantt metadata handling, C4 dispatch, and rendering robustness fixes

Parser: recognize gantt dateFormat and axisFormat as metadata statements
instead of flagging them as unsupported. Warn when dateFormat is not the
supported YYYY-MM-DD, and note axisFormat as not-yet-supported rather
than causing a fallback.

Renderer:
- navigate_direction: skip missing neighbors with continue instead of
  short-circuit return; replace unwrap() with map_or for distance cmp
- to_cell: clamp coordinates to u16::MAX before cast to prevent wrapping
  on extreme world-space values
- Add C4 diagram dispatch (render_c4_entities) alongside requirements
- Minor rustfmt reformatting in Gantt bar offset and quadrant label code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
